creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Mason,
Yes, I agree with these observations.
However, the software still works for me (is functional). It still allows me to find the printer on the network, configure the correct driver, and print.

So while the error messages are off putting, I haven't invested any time into patching them at this stage (patches welcome).

Are you able to configure a printer and print also?
